name: Signature Truffle Burger
description: A double-aged Wagyu patty topped with house-made black truffle aioli, shaved black truffles, and caramelized onions on a toasted brioche bun.

name: Miso Glazed Salmon
description: Wild-caught Atlantic salmon with a honey-miso glaze, served over charred broccolini.

name: Honey Smoked Ribs
description: Slow-cooked for 12 hours with a signature hickory spice rub and a sweet honey BBQ glaze.

name: Basil Pesto Penne
description: Hand-made penne tossed in fresh basil pesto, toasted pine nuts, and 24-month aged parmesan.

name: Crispy Parmesan Fries
description: Triple-cooked and tossed in aged parmesan and white truffle oil.

name: Yuzu Matcha Lemonade
description: A refreshing, sparkling blend of premium Japanese matcha and cold-pressed yuzu juice.

name: Dark Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm molten center crafted with 70% dark cacao, served alongside Madagascar vanilla bean gelato.

name: Wagyu Steak Frites
description: 8oz Wagyu flat iron steak perfectly seared, served with garlic herb butter and crispy fries.

name: Pan-Seared Scallops
description: Jumbo sea scallops pan-seared in brown butter over a bed of sweet corn purée and microgreens.

name: Truffle Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy arborio rice slow-cooked with wild mushrooms, white wine, and finished with truffle oil.

name: Charred Broccolini
description: Wood-fired broccolini topped with chili flakes, lemon zest, and toasted almonds.

name: Lobster Mac & Cheese
description: A rich blend of gruyère and sharp cheddar baked with tender chunks of fresh lobster.

name: Roasted Garlic Mashed Potatoes
description: Creamy Yukon gold potatoes whipped with roasted garlic and rich European butter.

name: Artisan Elderflower Spritz
description: A vibrant, non-alcoholic spritz made with elderflower syrup, sparkling water, and fresh mint.

name: Cold Brew Hibiscus Tea
description: Slow-steeped hibiscus petals mixed with a touch of agave and served over crushed ice.

name: Nitro Espresso Martini
description: A smooth, nitrogen-infused blend of cold brew espresso, vodka, and coffee liqueur.

name: Matcha Crème Brûlée
description: A twist on the classic with ceremonial grade matcha custard and a caramelized sugar shell.

name: Vegan Berry Tart
description: A crisp almond crust filled with vanilla coconut cream and topped with fresh seasonal berries.

name: Tiramisu Layer Cake
description: Layers of espresso-soaked sponge cake, mascarpone cream, and dusted with rich cocoa powder.
